meta.title: BREAKING: The B-21 RAIDER just made its FIRST FLIGHT
meta.description:
America’s new stealth bomber, the B-21 Raider, has officially made its first historic flight. This story was originally broken by photojournalist Matt Hartman, who captured incredible photographs and footage of the flight. 

We were then able to confirm that the flight took place through our sources at Northrop Grumman. 

You can see Matt Hartman's videos and photos here: https://twitter.com/ShorealoneFilms

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
